name: Jeremy Pelt
abstract: Jeremy Pelt (born November 4, 1976, in California) is an American jazz trumpeter.

concerts.label: Lady Liberty Jazz All-Stars Benefit Concert
Honor: Blues, Jazz, Rhythm and Blues, Soul, and Beyond

about_quotes.speaker: David Finck
about_quotes.evidence: I sent him the file and he played to the rhythm section... I was actually there for Jeremy’s part. He couldn’t make my session so he came in later.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015
